title: Enterprise UI & CI/CD for National Grid UK
description: Led the development of enterprise-grade UI platform for National Grid UK, a Fortune 500 energy company serving 20 million customers.
challenges: Complex regulatory and business requirements requiring careful translation to technical solutions
Weekly deployment cycles causing delayed feature releases and slow bug fixes
Inadequate test coverage leading to production defects
Manual deployment process prone to errors
solutions: Built enterprise UI with Next.js (SSR) + React 18 + TypeScript with strict typings and reusable components
Designed AWS CI/CD pipelines (CodePipeline, CodeBuild, Lambda, S3, CloudFront) reducing deployment cycles from weekly to daily
Automated testing with Vitest & Playwright achieving 90%+ coverage
Implemented payload optimization and caching strategies improving API response times by 25%
Designed AI-assisted internal tooling using Python for automated data validation and log analysis
impact: Reduced deployment cycles from weekly to daily (700% improvement)
Achieved 90%+ test coverage, reducing production defects
Enhanced developer productivity through AI-assisted tooling

title: AI Assistant for Shell Fleet Operations
description: Designed and implemented an enterprise-grade AI assistant for Shell's fleet operations, leveraging LLMs and RAG pipelines to reduce support tickets by 20%.
challenges: High volume of repetitive support tickets for fleet operations
Need for accurate, context-aware responses from internal Shell data
Integration with existing Azure cloud infrastructure
solutions: Designed AI assistant using LLMs, RAG pipelines, vector databases (FAISS, Pinecone), Node.js microservices, and MongoDB
Fine-tuned GPT models on Shell's internal data for context-aware responses
Integrated with Azure services (App Services, CosmosDB, Redis Cache, Front Door CDN, Blob Storage, AKS)
Deployed real-time monitoring with Azure Monitor + Application Insights
impact: Reduced MTTR by 30% through proactive monitoring
Recognized by Shell leadership for pioneering AI-assisted operations

title: Shell FleetHub Modernization
description: Led modernization of Shell's large-scale fleet management application serving thousands of global users with React 18 and modern architecture patterns.
challenges: Poor performance with slow load times
Low test coverage causing production regressions
solutions: Modernized with Redux Toolkit + RTK Query for efficient state/data management
Implemented code-splitting, memoization, and RTK Query caching
Enhanced API integration with .NET (C#) REST services with payload optimization
Built comprehensive test suites with Jest, Cypress, and Playwright (90%+ coverage)
Adopted Micro-Frontend architecture using Module Federation
Leveraged GitHub Copilot for AI-assisted development
impact: Reduced production regressions by 35% through 90%+ test coverage
Reduced operational costs by 15% through infrastructure optimization
Accelerated delivery by 15% with AI-assisted development

title: GatheredHQ — Restaurant POS & Digital Menu SaaS
description: Architected a production-grade, API-first hospitality SaaS (restaurant POS) from the ground up — QR digital menus, table-service and self-service ordering, real-time kitchen/bar display systems, bookings, and Stripe payments, with AI menu import and a Gemini-powered guest ordering assistant on a multi-tenant Supabase backend built to scale to 1M+ users.

title: Intuit QuickBooks Online - SMB Platform
description: Owned full-stack delivery for Intuit QuickBooks Online, serving millions of small and medium businesses worldwide.
challenges: Scaling platform to serve millions of SMB users globally
Migrating legacy React codebase to modern patterns
Ensuring high availability for critical financial features
solutions: Developed 60+ responsive, SEO-optimized landing pages driving SMB adoption
Migrated React codebase to Hooks, boosting performance by 30%
Optimized GraphQL queries reducing load times by 20%
Automated deployments via AWS (Lambda, EC2, Auto Scaling, CloudFront)
Strengthened QA with Jest + Cypress maintaining 95%+ coverage
impact: Reduced GraphQL query load times by 20%
Maintained 95%+ test coverage ensuring production stability
Delivered scalable financial features to millions of SMBs

title: RexQR — Multi-Tenant Hospitality & Services SaaS
description: Architected RexQR, a multi-tenant SaaS spanning Hospitality (restaurants, cafés, bars) and Services (salons, car wash, clinics) from a single vertical-aware platform — NestJS/Fastify backend, an AI Sales Agent (Gemini), AI reports & analytics, and full guest ordering, Stripe payments, bookings, loyalty/CRM, and KDS across owner, staff, and guest apps.
